name: durable-streams
description: Durable Streams server implementation and storage adapters.

scripts.typecheck: bun run build && bun run --filter '*' typecheck
scripts.test:conformance: bun run test:conformance:memory && bun run test:conformance:sqlite && bun run test:conformance:do
scripts.test:unit: bun run --cwd packages/core test:unit && bun run --cwd packages/json test:unit && bun run --cwd packages/state test:unit && bun run --cwd packages/storage-sqlite test:unit && bun run --cwd packages/storage-durable-object test:unit
scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/json build && bun run --cwd packages/state build && bun run --cwd packages/storage-sqlite build && bun run --cwd packages/storage-durable-object build
scripts.pack:dry-run: for dir in packages/core packages/json packages/state packages/storage-sqlite packages/storage-durable-object; do (cd "$dir" && bun pm pack --dry-run); done
